title: DVITA | Eye Care - Best eye hospital in Durgapur
heading: DVITA - BEST EYE HOSPITAL IN DURGAPUR
description: Dvita Eye hospital is a leading eye hospital in Durgapur and has grown to be the largest institution in East India to offer comprehensive care for eye diseases. DVITA
text:
DVITA | Eye Care - Best eye hospital in Durgapur About Us The Company was set up primarily to bring affordable, premium eye care services in the ROB region. There is an unmet need of an all-encompassing eye care institution in the cities and towns of Bengal and our vision is to bring here cutting-edge technology, premium service at affordable prices. YOUR VISION IS OUR VISION Dvita Eye Care provides comprehensive patient care, sight enhancement and rehabilitation, as well as high-impact rural eye health programs.In addition, the institute conducts cutting-edge research and provides training in human resources to all levels of ophthalmologists. Dvita Healthcare Private Limited (“DHPL” or “Dvita Eye Care” or the “Company”) was
incorporated in 12 July 2021. The founders of DHPL are majorly from healthcare background,
first being Dr. Satyajit Bose, Senior Cardiac Surgeon and well renowned entrepreneur in the
healthcare delivery vertical along with Dr. Priyansha Chatterjee, a very seasoned Cataract
Surgeon groomed in Narayana Nethralaya, Bangalore and Dr. Rahul Bose, Cardiac Surgeon along
with Ms. Sneha Bose, noted social worker. The overall eye check up experience was absolutely perfect” SURYA BHATTACHARJEE , “Excellent Very good experience and the staffs and doctors are very friendly” Srijan Dey , “It was my first visit, behavior of staff is good, doctor’s care to patient is excellent, l am satisfied.” Prasantta Das , “Excellent, and also very much satisfied, Thanks” BIPLAB KUMAR SAREN , “Service is very good and staff behaviour is also good.” Subir Adhikary , “Service are really very Good i am happy with there service” Debabrata Roy , Inspirational Stories 10000 + SUCCESSFUL SURGERIES 150000 + SATISFIED PATIENTS 500 + FREE EYE CAMPS Pentacam The Pentacam test is a non-invasive diagnostic tool used to assess the health and structure of the cornea. It uses a rotating camera to capture multiple images of the eye and create a 3D map of the cornea. This information can be used to diagnose and monitor conditions such as keratoconus, corneal dystrophies, and other corneal abnormalities. The Pentacam test is often used by ophthalmologists and optometrists as part of a comprehensive eye exam. Pleasant atmosphare  and active support. Thanks Ruben Sen 2 years ago Excellent infrastructure and systems. Right from entry till session with doctor things are very systematic and quite fast. Staff and doctors are very professional and courteous. Had visited for retina check up by Dr KK Roy, who was excellent in the way he carried out the checks and councelled about the conditions. Clinic is well maintained with ample sitting spaces. Highly recommended. Dr Roy is a very reputed name in Durgapur. Suman Chattopadhay 2 years ago Went for my first Eye Consult,Staff is patient and very helpful. And facilities are clean and tidy. With good equipments. Hope the medicines work. Will visit in the near future. Manoj Bhattacharjee 3 years ago Very good behaviour of all the staffs. Pleasant atmosphere and active support. Thanks. SHATABDI RAKSHIT 3 years ago I am going through a treatment process under the guidance of Dr Gayatri Kanungo..Really having wonderful experience till now..though I am not cured completely till now but improved a lot. Dr and staffs are really very friendly. After having 10 days of treatment in a nearby hospital I visited to her ..She looked same tensed as if she is my family member. But She checked my eyes very carefully and decided my medicines as per need. Within two days I felt improvement in my condition. Mary Smith 3 years ago My daughter needed an eye exam. She has worn glasses most of her life. When we entered the parking lot we were pleased to find adequate parking. Upon entering the building we were greeted by professionally dressed, helpful greeters at the registration desk. We paid our 200 rupee registration fee and were given a token with a number on it so we would know when it would be our turn to see the doctor. First she was evaluated with some high tech, hygienic vision checking equipment by a technician to evaluate her current glasses and ability to read eye charts from different distances. We waiting briefly after that; maybe about 5 minutes until the doctor was available to consult with us. She was friendly and offered us a treatment option for her lazy eye condition which often causes her to have double vision. The experience was informative and pleasant. Next we went to the conveniently located eye glass shop in the same facility. The glasses selection was plentiful and fashionable as well as functional. They had a buy one get one half off offer on lenses. Staff was friendly and helpful. I used the ladies toilet prior to leaving. It was clean, practically spotless which is refreshing. Loved the artwork also which was Indian handicraft art from Shantinikitan. (Sp). Overall a great experience! Thank you. 😊 Asitava Bandyopadhyay 3 years ago Excellent behaviour of front line officials, staff & all technical support team. Very neat and clean & nicely maintained. Doctor Roy was very friendly & seems to be very knowledgeable & skilled surgeon. I had undergone cataract surgery on my right eye on 11th. April’23; doing well and no problem at all. Someshree Banerjee 4 years ago Very Good facilities and very organised. Very clean and tidy. They have a wide range of lenses to choose from. We had an appointment with the doctor for a cataract surgery. It went well. They have an inhouse medical store to cater the needs. Highly recommended. Newsletter Subscribe to get in touch with us.
